category_sources: Official docs at https://yadm.io/docs/getting_started describe yadm commands as Git-like dotfile management.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://yadm.io/ uses the name yadm.
docs_sources: Official documentation is hosted under the yadm.io/docs path.
Search/open result for https://yadm.io/docs/common_commands identifies Git-like command documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/yadm-dev/yadm, so repository lookup was not performed.
tags_sources: Official docs at https://yadm.io/docs/common_commands describe yadm as wrapping Git operations.
source_facts.description identifies yadm as a dotfiles manager.
